name: @vabole/skills-meta
description: Control plane for external skill sources, local forks, and curated install collections.

scripts.smoke: tsx src/cli.ts list --json > /dev/null && tsx src/cli.ts install motion --dry-run --json > /dev/null && tsx src/cli.ts validate --json > /dev/null
scripts.ci: pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm smoke
